input-field.name: apiPublicKey
input-field.label: Public Key
input-field.helpText: Your Flutterwave public API key. This can be found in your Flutterwave dashboard under API keys.

input-field.name: apiSecretKey
input-field.label: Secret Key
input-field.helpText: Your Flutterwave secret API key. Keep this secure and never share it publicly.

input-field.name: apiEncryptionKey
input-field.label: Encryption Key
input-field.helpText: Your Flutterwave encryption key. Used for additional security when processing payments.

input-field.name: enableSandbox
input-field.label: Enable Sandbox
input-field.helpText: Enable this option to use Flutterwave's sandbox environment for testing payments.

input-field.name: apiPublicKeySandbox
input-field.label: Public Key
input-field.helpText: Your Flutterwave public API key. This can be found in your Flutterwave dashboard under API keys.

input-field.name: apiSecretKeySandbox
input-field.label: Secret Key
input-field.helpText: Your Flutterwave secret API key. Keep this secure and never share it publicly.

input-field.name: apiEncryptionKeySandbox
input-field.label: Encryption Key
input-field.helpText: Your Flutterwave encryption key. Used for additional security when processing payments.

input-field.name: title
input-field.label: Title
input-field.helpText: The payment method title that customers will see during checkout.

input-field.name: description
input-field.label: Description
input-field.helpText: A brief description of the payment method that will be shown to customers.

component.name: sw-media-field
logo
component.label: Payment Method Logo
component.helpText: Upload a custom logo that will be displayed next to the payment method name during checkout.

input-field.name: paymentOptions
input-field.label: Payment Options
input-field.helpText: Select which payment options to enable. Leave empty to show all available options to customers.

input-field.name: sessionDuration
input-field.label: Session Duration (minutes)
input-field.helpText: The duration in minutes that a payment session remains valid before expiring.

input-field.name: maxRetryAttempt
input-field.label: Max Retry Attempts
input-field.helpText: The maximum number of times a customer can retry a failed payment before being blocked.

input-field.name: enableDebugging
input-field.label: Enable error logging
input-field.helpText: Enable detailed error logging for debugging purposes. Disable in production environments.
